category_sources: Official topydo docs at https://topydo.github.io/topydo/ describe it as a console todo.txt application.
source_facts.description says topydo is a todo list application using the todo.txt format.
display_name_sources: Official project homepage/repository uses the name topydo.
docs_sources: Official GitHub Pages documentation site for topydo.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.source-archive is a Python package tarball.
